All right, hey everyone. So, getting your ads disproved, you want to obviously get them approved. So, first thing you want to do is you wanna come over here to add manager. And then from there, once it loads up, you're gonna wanna basically just create a new campaign and it's really easy to do this. You just have to go through the ads set up one more time. And that can potentially solve it. So, you want to go, these are some old ads for an old business that I ran a while ago. You can actually delete your old, so say it's these campaigns that are just not getting approved for one reason or another. You can trash them. Delete, no problem. And then from there, you're just gonna create and generally you want one ad per campaign, or I'm sorry, one ad per ads set. So, you're just gonna create it as a new campaign. I'm gonna go through it just like the normal ad creation training shows you how to, but yeah, this would be the first step to getting those disproved ads approved. So, hope this helps. If not, see you in the next video.
